mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT p.perm_code FROM sys_user_role ur INNER JOIN sys_role_permission rp ON ur.role_id = rp.role_id INNER JOIN sys_permission p ON rp.permission_id = p.id WHERE ur.user_id = #{userId} AND p.is_deleted = 0 AND p.status = 1
SELECT r.role_code FROM sys_user_role ur INNER JOIN sys_role r ON ur.role_id = r.id WHERE ur.user_id = #{userId} AND r.is_deleted = 0 AND r.status = 1
